title: AI Specialist - Senior Fullstack Engineer
company_focus:
Data and software services for vehicle lifecycle, home
protection, and digital identity
description:
Who We Are

Solera is a global leader in data and software services that
strives to transform every touchpoint of the vehicle
lifecycle into a connected digital experience. In addition,
we provide products and services to protect life’s other
most important assets: our homes and digital identities.
Today, Solera processes over 300 million digital
transactions annually for approximately 235,000 partners and
customers in more than 90 countries. Our 6,500 team members
foster an uncommon, innovative culture and are dedicated to
successfully bringing the future to bear today through
cognitive answers, insights, algorithms and automation.  For
more information, please visit solera.com.



The Role

You will be part of a tiger-team that targets products
within the business where development velocity needs
boosting or platforms need re-architecting. This will be
done primarily through simplification, technology uplift,
automation and leveraging advanced AI tooling.  As more of
our products look to incorporate AI into their solutions,
you will help them select appropriate models and integrate
them. You will also help build out and maintain our AI
infrastructure.



What You’ll Do

Your tiger-team will work alongside the existing development
teams driving the development, before handing over the new
development practices to them. The target technology stack
is generally JAVA, SQL Server and React, but the legacy
technology could be anything.

Secondary roles include upskilling the development teams you
work with and contributing to the definition of our next-gen
AI SDLC process.



Develop/Redevelop enterprise solutions for Solera’s
portfolio of products, primarily in JAVA.

Utilise the evolving range of AI tooling to accelerate
development

Upskill and handover to the existing product team members,
the new codebase/solution



What You’ll Bring

You are a highly experienced senior software engineer with
10+ years in a senior role, happy to design and deliver
projects end-to-end; solo or in a team environment. You will
be used to significant autonomy and responsibility to
deliver results.



Essential skills are:

Extensive Full stack JAVA/TSQL/React hands-on development
experience.

Self-starting problem solver who is easy to work with

Ability to quickly upskill in new technologies and
understand complex enterprise environments

Excellent communication skills, allowing you to integrate
with existing product teams and brief stakeholders.

Positive can-do attitude in the face of adversity

Practical experience utilising latest AI technologies to
accelerate development. (GitHub Copilot preferred)

Ability to rapidly develop and ship tested code

Solid experience writing automated integration tests,
ideally BDD style.

Implementing AI solutions in the enterprise.



Desirable skills:

Familiarity with writing enterprise Java applications

Team lead experience

Process automation

Experience with DevOps pipelines, particularly GitHib
actions and Jenkins



It is impossible to list every requirement for, or
responsibility of, any position.  Similarly, we cannot
identify all the skills a position may require since job
responsibilities and the Company’s needs may change over
time.  Therefore, the above job description is not
comprehensive or exhaustive.   The Company reserves the
right to adjust, add to or eliminate any aspect of the above
description.  The Company also retains the right to require
all employees to undertake additional or different job
responsibilities when necessary to meet business needs.

EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER SOLERA HOLDINGS, INC., AND ITS US
SUBSIDIARIES (TOGETHER, SOLERA) IS AN EQUAL EMPLOYMENT
OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER. THE FIRM'S POLICY IS NOT TO
DISCRIMINATE AGAINST ANY APPLICANT OR EMPLOYEE BASED ON
RACE, COLOR, RELIGION, NATIONAL ORIGIN, GENDER, AGE, SEXUAL
ORIENTATION, GENDER IDENTITY OR EXPRESSION, MARITAL STATUS,
MENTAL OR PHYSICAL DISABILITY, AND GENETIC INFORMATION, OR
ANY OTHER BASIS PROTECTED BY APPLICABLE LAW. THE FIRM ALSO
PROHIBITS HARASSMENT OF APPLICANTS OR EMPLOYEES BASED ON ANY
OF THESE PROTECTED CATEGORIES.
responsibilities: Participate in tiger-team initiatives to boost development velocity and re-architect platforms through simplification and technology uplift
Help product teams select appropriate AI models and integrate them into existing solutions
Build and maintain AI infrastructure to support product integration efforts
Develop and redeploy enterprise solutions primarily using JAVA technology stack
Upskill existing product teams on new development practices and AI tooling
Contribute to the definition of next-gen AI SDLC processes
use_cases: Home and digital identity protection services
AI model integration for existing product enhancement
Development velocity improvement through AI tooling
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role focuses on helping existing teams integrate AI
models into their products and building AI infrastructure,
but does not involve hands-on model development, training,
or deployment. The primary responsibility is accelerating
development using AI tools like GitHub Copilot and
selecting/appropriating models for product integration.
